  "advertisements_text": [
    "CUNARD LINE\nFastest ocean service in the world\nCHERBOURG-NEW YORK\nregular weekly sailings of the\nMAURETANIA\n32,000 tons\nAQUITANIA\n45,000 tons\nBERENGARIA\n52,000 tons\nalso from\nHavre-Southampton to New York\nHamburg, Cherbourg to Canada and New York\nLondon, Cherbourg to Canada and New York\nLiverpool to New York and Canada\nAPPLY TO THE\nCUNARD LINE\nor to all Agencies and\nOffices of THOS. COOK & SON; The AMERICAN EXPRESS Co., Inc.;\nFreight Agents: CROWE & Co., BASLE, ZURICH, ST. GALL & CHIASSO"
    ,
    "J.R. GEIGY, Soc. An.\nBranches at\nMaromme, nr. Rouen\n& Huningue (Alsace)\nBASLE, SWITZERLAND\nEstablished A. D. 1764\nBranch at\nNew York\nEnglish Branch Works: The Clayton Aniline Company Ltd, Clayton, Manchester\nManufacturers\nof\nANILINE COLOURS FOR ALL TRADES\nSUMAC- and GALL-EXTRACTS, TANNATE for LEATHER\nTANNIC and PYROGALLIC ACIDS\nConcessionnaires in Great Britain:\nThe Geigy Colour Company, Ltd.,\n35/37, Dickinson Street, Manchester.\nMessrs. C. Roberts & Co., Ltd.,\n4, Vincent Street, Bradford.\nMessrs. A. & M. Zimmermann Ltd.,\n3, Lloyds Avenue, London, E.C.3.\nMessrs. Hy. Every & Co.,\n183, Rutherglen Road, Glasgow.\nThe Geigy Colour Company Ltd.,\n36-38, Causeway Lane, Leicester."
  ]
  ,
